Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 221 

PART_C_PREMIUM 

LABEL: Part C Premium 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the Medicare Advantage (referred to as Medicare Part C) Basic 
Plus Mandatory Supplemental Premium Rate (Net of Rebates). 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PART_C_PREMIUM 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The width of this value changed from 12 to 8 in
